name: Product Agent - Weekly Review & GitHub Actions Trigger

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'Product Agent', message: 'Weekly review complete for ' + $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.businessName + '. Created ' + $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.issueCount + ' issues (P0: ' + $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.p0Count + ', P1: ' + $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.p1Count + ', P2: ' + $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.p2Count + '). Top issues: ' + $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.issues.slice(0, 3).map(i => i.priority + ' ' + i.title).join('; '), severity: $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.p0Count > 0 ? 'critical' : 'info', businessId: $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.businessId, requiresResponse: $('Parse GitHub Issues').first().json.p0Count > 0 }) }}
